reasoning: The control AC-4(7) focuses on enforcing one-way information flow. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved through NetworkPolicies that restrict traffic to one-way flows, either ingress or egress. Additionally, service meshes like Istio can enforce one-way traffic rules at the application layer, providing more granular control over traffic flows.
